commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair remains; maintainer review should decide whether the supplied wait-layer proof is enough without live sub-agent timeout proof.; Cleared: The patch only changes TypeScript wait-state logic and colocated tests; I found no concrete security or supply-chain regression. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `waitForAgentJob`'s outer timeout callback to forward pending hard timeout snapshots and adds fake-timer regression tests for provider timeout and soft queue-timeout recovery.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +90. Total +103 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current `main` schedules pending timeout snapshots but the outer timer only forwards pending errors, so a hard timeout can resolve as null before the grace timer publishes it. I did not execute the repro locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair remains; maintainer review should decide whether the supplied wait-layer proof is enough without live sub-agent timeout proof.
